heading: Settings
showGoalOnStartupDesc: Display the goals screen when the app starts
showInactiveDatesDesc: Show dates with no activity in goal details
praiseModeDesc: Add praise messages and animations to recording feedback
upgradeText: Upgrade to Pro to unlock all features including API key management and voice recording.
localStorageNote: Activities and records are stored in your browser's local storage (IndexedDB). Data can be restored through server synchronization.
deleteLocalDataConfirm: All locally stored data will be deleted. Data will be re-synced from the server on next access. Are you sure?
fullResetMessage: Delete all local data, cache, and Service Workers. Use this if sync or app performance issues occur.
googleLinkDescription: Link your Google account to sign in with Google.
appleLinkDescription: Link your Apple account to sign in with Apple ID.
deleteAccountConfirm: Deleting your account will remove all locally stored data. This action cannot be undone.
apiKeyManagement: Manage API keys for external application access
apiKeyNameHint: Give your API key an easy-to-identify name
apiKeyWarning: This API key is only displayed once. Copy and store it securely.
premiumFeatureDescription: API key functionality is available only to premium plan users.
